tldr: Switch from AppsFlyer to Airbridge while preserving comparable MMP capabilities. Validate current commercial terms on each vendor's official pricing page before committing to the move.
why_switch: Looking to reduce dependence on AppsFlyer's metered model in favor of a published subscription tier
Strong APAC coverage and incrementality features in Airbridge
Comparable feature set: deep linking, web-to-app, SKAdNetwork support
Lower lock-in score on our scoring model
Confirm current pricing tiers and any free-tier limits on Airbridge's official pricing page before signing
what_to_export: Raw install and in-app event logs
Deep link and OneLink-style universal link mappings
export_method: Use AppsFlyer's data export options (Pull/Push API, Data Locker) to land raw installs, in-app events, and re-attributions into your warehouse or S3. Verify current export endpoints, retention windows, and rate limits in AppsFlyer's official documentation before scheduling the export.
import_method: Integrate the Airbridge SDK in a new app build and recreate campaign, partner, and postback configuration in the Airbridge console. For history, keep the AppsFlyer export in cold storage and join it with Airbridge data in your warehouse. Run both SDKs in parallel for one to two weeks to reconcile attribution before cutting over. Refer to current Airbridge docs for supported partner integrations, SDK versions, and any S2S ingestion paths.

concept_mapping.note: Map event names and parameters; recheck currency/revenue keys
Re-create universal links and validate iOS/Android routing
Re-enable each ad network from Airbridge's partner catalog
Confirm available export channels in Airbridge docs
Re-define conversion values; do not assume parity
Recreate manually; segment logic may differ

gotchas: Run dual SDKs for at least one full attribution window to reconcile counts
Each ad network needs reconfiguration on the partner side, not just in Airbridge
Historical LTV reports stay in AppsFlyer; plan a warehouse-side join
Mind iOS App Store update timing for the SDK swap
Validate fraud filtering parity before disabling AppsFlyer billing
Confirm pricing, free-tier limits, and overage rules with both vendors for your install volume before cutover

email.subject: Migrating MMP from AppsFlyer to Airbridge
email.body:
Hi team,

We're planning to move our mobile attribution from AppsFlyer to Airbridge. The goal is more predictable cost behavior and a lower lock-in profile on attribution data. Commercial terms on both sides will be re-confirmed with sales before we sign.

Plan:
1. Export raw installs, events, and re-attributions from AppsFlyer (Data Locker / Pull API) into our warehouse.
2. Integrate Airbridge SDK in the next release and reconfigure partners, deep links, and SKAN conversion values.
3. Run both SDKs in parallel for 1-2 weeks to reconcile attribution.
4. Cut over once numbers match within tolerance.

Expected effort: 1-3 weeks. We'll keep AppsFlyer historical data in cold storage for reporting. Please verify current pricing on each vendor's official page before approvals.

Let me know concerns before we kick off.
